name: Weave RPC Probe D3D11
description: XR_DXR_weave probe (#625): a browser-free present-owner that drives the window-bound synchronous weave service. Binds its window, hands the runtime a pre-weave SBS texture + a window-relative rect per frame via xrWeaveSubmitDXR, and presents the weaved handback via its own DirectComposition swap chain. Validates the DP weave round-trip and per-frame latency with zero browser.
